Introduction
    A rural island bachelor, Bong Chul-Hee, is not the ideal candidate to get married. A public civil servant, Jung Ha-Na, doesn't believe in marriage, but is on a "Marriage Recruitment" team that is tasked to be a matchmaker for Chul...
